no: Yvette Romance Uses READLN for dialogue style selection during install. Choose 1 for original dialogues. Requires manual input. WARNING: EET_NPC_TRANSITION reports 7XCRE2/4/5/6.cre don't exist. Yvette CRE variants for BG1 transitions not found. Cosmetic — NPC works in BG2/ToB. ACTION_READLN stall — mod prompts for dialogue style choice (1 or 2) during install. Mod_installer now auto-responds with 1 in automated mode.
sum: Romance mod adding Yvette as a joinable NPC for male protagonists, with content spanning both Shadows of Amn and Throne of Bhaal.

co.no: mod_installer: ACTION_READLN for dialogue style choice. Uses READLN for dialogue style selection during install. Choose 1 for original dialogues, 2 for no action text. Requires manual input - cannot be fully automated.

in.t: Uses ACTION_READLN for dialogue style choice (1=original, 2=no action text). Requires manual input.

co.n: Alternative portrait based on MichelO's art
co.no: COMMENTED OUT in v5.1 tp2 — do not use.
